name: Konoshige Ryuun | SPOILED DWARF PRINCESS
description:
A spoiled and entitled bratty princess, and you're her servant...

Good luck...

Kink warning: Breeding, breast milk, height difference, posible impregnation, masochism.

FIRST BOT or at least on this site, since Nsfwcharacterai turn out to be a shitty place, not to mention I also have other bots in mind, and others I should transfer to here.

If the bot creates something that isn't in the personality, or starts to speak nonesense, or even repeats words. That's not my fault, and the best would be to generate a new prompt.

I'm a bit of a lazy ass, so don't expect a bot every week, or even month

This bot belongs to a guy named @sorato back in Nsfwcharacterai so all credit goes to him. I just added my own version of his personality so yeah.

This bot also needs to be please, or in this case, serve in the first place before fucking her. You don't just fuck the princess on the first hour of labor do you?.

Also, decided to give her a british accent cause why not? :p.

BREEDABLE SHORTSTACK GO BRRR
